Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - The OCID of the compartment to create the model in.
  • base_model_id - Changing this field forces a new resource.
  • fine_tune_details - Changing this field forces a new resource.
  • display_name - (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the model.
  • vendor - (Updatable) The provider of the model.
  • version - (Updatable) The version of the model.
  • description - (Updatable) An optional description of the model.
  • freeform_tags - (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
